author: anon-13168fa2
content: Added Live Server to the Phase 0 recommended extensions list (now three instead of two). Rewrote the 01-talking-to-agents/05-first-build.md:97 Open the file line to make Live Server the primary instruction (right-click index.html, Open with Live Server, auto-reload behavior explained) with a fallback install hint for readers who skipped Phase 0. Both files are now consistent.
